end of world model.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Player can't move UP further (hit ceiling at rows 18-23)
# Blue block at rows 13-16, above player
# Red and green blocks collected and following player
# Path extends horizontally, can't reach blue block above
# 
# Let me try extending the path RIGHT to see if it reaches the blue block

result = action(['RIGHT'])
print("RIGHT result:", result)

ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
seg = current_frame.segmentation

print("\nBlocks in room:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['R', 'N', 'b']:
        b = n['boundary']
        minr = min(x[0] for x in b)
        minc = min(x[1] for x in b)
        maxr = max(x[0] for x in b)
        maxc = max(x[1] for x in b)
        if minr < 54:
            print(f"  {n['color']}: rows {minr}-{maxr}, cols {minc}-{maxc}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Check path
print("\nPath area:")
for r in range(18, 24):
    print(f"Row {r}: {ascii_lines[r][30:50]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
